final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input load,
	input [3:0] data_in,
	output reg [3:0] data);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if (load) begin
		data <= data_in;
	end else begin
		data <= {1'b0, data[3:1]};
	end
end

endmodule
